title: Square Root of Integer
hints: Use binary search to find the square root in O(log A) time.
Search in the range [0, A] for the largest integer whose square is <= A.
For a given mid, check if mid*mid <= A. If yes, update answer and search right for larger values.
If mid*mid > A, search left for smaller values.
Use long to prevent integer overflow when calculating mid*mid.
The answer is the largest integer whose square is <= A.
